headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -77.0)
key_insights: Fears trending up 25% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 147 quotes and 109 at strong intensity - people are expressing deep anger and dissatisfaction today.
• Despite leading activity, frustration scores dropped from yesterday's peak but remain very high within the 146-day range.
• Optimism continues struggling with negative sentiment, while fears declined significantly from yesterday but stay below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
